columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: upt_last_visit_status
columns.label: Last visit status
columns.description: Indicates the current disease status based on the most recent clinical or radiological assessment.

columns.name: upt_last_visit_date
columns.label: Last visit date
columns.description: Records the exact date of the patient's last documented clinical interaction.

columns.name: upt_exitus_date
columns.label: Exitus date
columns.description: Records the exact date of the patient's death.

columns.name: upt_last_ecog
columns.label: Last ECOG
columns.description: Indicates the level of functionality and autonomy of the patient in their activities of daily living.

columns.name: upt_patient_stat
columns.label: Patient vital status
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient is alive or deceased (exitus) at the time of the last data update.
